zh.lifeSummary: 當William Thorn於1428年9月26日出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾格林可時，他的父親Nicholas Torun Thorn40歲，母親Elizabeth Mary McKillop34歲。他於大約1449年與Kathleen McDowell在蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1511年9月9日在蘇格蘭艾丁波享年82歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾丁波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Thorn于1428年9月26日出生在苏格兰雷福福爾格林可时，他的父亲Nicholas Torun Thorn40岁，母亲Elizabeth Mary McKillop34岁。他于大约1449年与Kathleen McDowell在苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1511年9月9日在苏格兰艾丁波享年82岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾丁波。

nameMeanings.name: Thorn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived by a thorn bush or hedge (Old English, Old Norse thorn, Middle English thorn(e), torn(e)). The name is also found in Sweden.
English: habitational name from a place called with Old English, Old Norse thorn ‘thorn bush’ (see 1 above), for example Thorne in Kent, Somerset, and South Yorkshire.
North German and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived near a tower, from Middle Low German torn ‘tower’.

variants.name: Thorner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Fritzi, Ilse.
German (Thörner): topographic name for someone who lived by a thorn bush, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Thorn (see Thorn 3 and 4).
German: occupational name for a watchman on a tower.

variants.name: Thorns
meanings: North German (Lower Saxony): variant of   Thorn  .

English (Sussex, Yorkshire and Staffordshire): variant of Thorne with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. There are various minor places called Thorns or Thornes, including Thornes in Wakefield (Yorkshire) and Thornes in Stonnall (Staffordshire), which appear to be principal sources of the surname.

variants.name: Thorne
meanings: Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’. Compare   Thornton  .
Swedish (mainly Thörne): ornamental or perhaps topographic name from törne ‘rose bush’ or thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Thorn was born on 26 September 1428, in Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Nicholas Torun Thorn, was 40 and his mother, Elizabeth Mary McKillop, was 34. He married Kathleen McDowell about 1449, in Edinburgh, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 September 1511, in Edinburgh, Scotland, at the age of 82, and was buried in Edinburgh, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Thorn est né le 26 septembre 1428, à Greenock, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Nicholas Torun Thorn, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mary McKillop, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Kathleen McDowell environ 1449, à Edinburgh, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1511, à Edinburgh, Écosse, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Edinburgh, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Thorn am 26. September 1428 in Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Torun Thorn 40 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Mary McKillop 34. Er hat um 1449 in Edinburgh, Scotland Kathleen McDowell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1511 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Edinburgh, Scotland und wurde in Edinburgh, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Thorn è nato il il 26 settembre 1428 nel Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Nicholas Torun Thorn, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Mary McKillop, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Kathleen McDowell circa 1449, nel Edinburgh, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 settembre 1511, nel Edinburgh, Scotland, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Edinburgh, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: William Thornが1428年9月26日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアグレエノックで生まれた時，父Nicholas Torun Thornは40歳，母Elizabeth Mary McKillopは34歳であった。約1449年にスコットランドエディンブルグでKathleen McDowellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1511年9月9日にスコットランドエディンブルグで82歳で死去し，スコットランドエディンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Thorn(이)가 1428년 9월 26일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 그린옥크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Torun Thorn(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Mary McKillop(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1449년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 Kathleen McDowell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1511년 9월 9일 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에 묻혔다.

pt.26 September 1428–9 September 1511: 26 de setembro de 1428–9 de setembro de 1511
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Thorn nasceu em 26 de setembro de 1428, em Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Nicholas Torun Thorn, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mary McKillop, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Kathleen McDowell aproximadamente 1449, em Edinburgh, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1511, em Edinburgh, Scotland, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Edinburgh, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Thorn родился 26 сентября 1428 г. в местности гринокк, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Torun Thorn было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mary McKillop, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Kathleen McDowell около 1449 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1511 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности эдинбург, Шотландия.

es.26 September 1428–9 September 1511: 26 de septiembre de 1428–9 de septiembre de 1511
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Thorn nació el 26 de septiembre de 1428, en Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Nicholas Torun Thorn, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Mary McKillop, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Kathleen McDowell aproximadamente 1449, en Edinburgh, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1511, en Edinburgh, Scotland, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Edinburgh, Scotland.
